LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicus.label: celestial umbilicus
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicus.description: A colossal umbilical that consumes hemogel power to grow a living orbital tether.
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusPortal.label: celestial umbilicus portal
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusPortal.description: A stabilized living umbilicus that links the colony to the flesh moon.
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusMoonExit.label: celestial umbilicus
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusMoonExit.descriptio: The moon-side root of a stabilized celestial umbilicus.
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusEmbryo.label: celestial umbilicus embryo
LanguageData.FB_CelestialUmbilicusEmbryo.description: An immature orbital organ that will grow into a celestial umbilicus.
